description: Short-text FILL band (v2 rebuild, 2026-07-06). The v1 'small vignette / abundant cream' breath-page was SCRAPPED 2026-05-24 for unreliable Gemini size compliance (the vignette-shrink rationale is preserved in git history). This v2 reuses the slot with the PROVEN prompt-3-iter-2 architecture instead: a wide watercolour band across the TOP ~70% of the page (object-fit:cover, soft feather into the cream), and a COMPACT cream text band below, sized + large-fonted so a SHORT narrative (about 150 chars or fewer) FILLS it instead of leaving a big empty text area. Purpose: the SIMPLEST reading-level workhorse — 1 to 2 short board-book sentences per page that would read sparse on the 300-char workhorses (prompt-2/3/8). Type C (fixed config.textRegion + auto-fit). Auto-fit sizes the short text UP toward maxFontSize so a 46-char page reads as a big, warm line under a big illustration, not a lonely sentence in white space.

selection_metadata.summary: A large illustration band on top with one or two SHORT lines of big, warm text on a compact cream strip below. For very short, simple, board-book narration — the text is set large so a brief sentence fills the page instead of reading sparse.

imageGeneration.customCompositionRules: full body, clean uncluttered background, consistent framing, face clearly visible.
imageGeneration.compositionPromptTemplate:
Paint a FULL watercolor scene that fills the frame edge to edge — do NOT leave any blank cream area inside the image. Full-bleed watercolour reaching all four edges of the frame: no cream or white border, no vignette, no floating spot-illustration, no framed inset. The painting bleeds off every edge.

PLACEMENT: keep the protagonist and the main focal action in the UPPER TWO-THIRDS of the frame, roughly centred and generously sized. The BOTTOM THIRD of the frame is the calmest, least-detailed part of the composition — a soft, open wash such as quiet ground, calm water, or gentle foreground — with no faces, no key action, and no important objects there. This quiet lower band is purely a compositional choice for a restful, uncluttered foreground.

Do not paint, letter, or write any text, letters, words, captions, numbers, or signage anywhere in the image.

STYLE: warm, friendly, storybook watercolor with visible pigment granulation and soft organic edges, an inviting picture-book moment for a very young reader.
